description: Given a healthcare portal URL and user credentials, navigate to the appointment scheduling page and extract the next appointment date and time. Handles both successful extraction and absence of appointments.

evaluation.validation_summary: Ctx2Skill-lite preview verifier contract. External corpus parse/audit keeps this ephemeral until a human approves import.

implementation.prompt_template: Execute a browser-based workflow to check the next appointment. Navigate to {portal_url}, log in with {username} and {password}, then access the appointment scheduling page. Extract the next appointment date and time. If no appointment is found, return 'No upcoming appointments'.

portal_url.description: The URL of the healthcare portal login page.

next_appointment.description: The extracted next appointment date and time, or a message indicating no appointment found.

postconditions: The next appointment date and time is extracted if available.
If no appointment exists, an appropriate message is returned.
preconditions: User has valid credentials for the healthcare portal.
The portal URL is accessible and the login page is reachable.

name: check_appointment_trajectory_browser_use_09_check_appointment

challenges.expected_evidence: A string containing the next appointment date and time, e.g., '2025-01-15 10:30 AM'.
challenges.failure_signal: An error message, login failure, or inability to locate the appointment data on the page.
rubric: Navigates to the correct portal URL.
Successfully logs in with provided credentials.
Extracts a valid date and time string from the page.
challenges.task: Given valid credentials for a healthcare portal, extract the next appointment date and time.

challenges.expected_evidence: A message like 'No upcoming appointments' or an empty date field.
challenges.failure_signal: Failure to detect the absence, e.g., returning a placeholder date or raising an error.
rubric: Navigates to the appointment scheduling page.
Detects that no appointment is listed or that a 'no appointments' message is present.
Returns a clear indication that no appointment exists.
challenges.task: Given a healthcare portal where no future appointments are scheduled, detect and report the absence of an appointment.

constraints: The portal may have session timeouts or CAPTCHA challenges.
Page load times and dynamic content may affect extraction.
examples: Use this browser-use example as a public multi-step browser task.
facts: Healthcare portals require user authentication to view appointments.
Appointment scheduling pages typically display next available date and time.
Extracting appointment data involves navigating through multiple pages after login.
procedures: Extract the next appointment date and time.
context_pack.summary: Automated process to check the next appointment date and time from a healthcare portal by navigating to the portal, logging in, accessing the scheduling page, and extracting the relevant information.

ctx2skill_evidence.demo_scope: P0/P1 demo-paper implementation; not full long-horizon self-play training.

judge_results.rationale: Ctx2Skill-lite replay score meets the demo threshold.
Ctx2Skill-lite replay score meets the demo threshold.

ctx2skill_evidence.paper_method: Ctx2Skill-lite: challenger -> reasoner/judge -> proposer -> cross-time replay

selected_candidate.prompt_template: Execute a browser-based workflow to check the next appointment. If no appointment is found, return 'No upcoming appointments'.

ctx2skill_evidence.selected_reason: The 'check_appointment' skill directly addresses the core functionality of extracting appointment information from a healthcare portal. It is reusable across different portals and user credentials, and the challenges demonstrate its applicability in both standard and edge-case scenarios. With a cross-time replay lite score of 0.75, it is the strongest candidate for automating this common browser-based task.
